rules.textPlacement: right side, text baked into image
rules.aura: always present behind deity, anchored in the deity reference aura and supported by the selected intent mood

intents.label: Abundance / Success
intents.mood: sacred prosperity, breakthrough, divine support, success momentum

intents.label: Protection
intents.mood: shielded, fearless, spiritually guarded, protected from negativity

intents.label: Peace / Meditation
intents.mood: deep peace, inner stillness, meditative calm, soft devotion

intents.label: Knowledge / Clarity
intents.mood: clarity, sacred wisdom, intelligent insight, creative guidance

intents.label: Transformation
intents.mood: fierce rebirth, karma release, destruction of obstacles, spiritual transformation

deities.name: Ganesha
deities.visualSignature: elephant head, large belly, large compassionate eyes, golden ornaments, lotus, modak, blessing hand, monumental sacred presence
deities.auraStyle: warm amber-orange aura with concentric glow, golden particles, and divine prosperity radiance

deities.name: Shiva
deities.visualSignature: third eye, crescent moon, blue throat, trident, cobra, ash-toned skin, meditative powerful gaze
deities.auraStyle: electric blue shield aura with blue haze, divine protection charge, and crisp rim light

deities.name: Hanuman
deities.visualSignature: orange-red body, muscular build, gada mace, devotional gaze, heroic protective posture, fierce compassionate expression
deities.auraStyle: fiery orange-red aura with fire particles, strength, courage, and devotional power

deities.name: Krishna
deities.visualSignature: dark blue skin, yellow dhoti, flute, peacock feather, serene loving expression, luminous devotional beauty
deities.auraStyle: teal-blue devotional aura with star particles, moonlit softness, and peaceful divine love

deities.name: Lakshmi
deities.visualSignature: four arms, lotus flowers, gold coins flowing from palm, gold sari, serene abundance, regal divine beauty
deities.auraStyle: golden prosperity aura with lotus shimmer, warm abundance glow, and sacred wealth radiance

deities.name: Durga
deities.visualSignature: 8-10 arms with weapons, lion mount, fierce compassionate face, commanding protective goddess energy
deities.auraStyle: deep violet protective aura with fierce halo, goddess power, and radiant warrior presence

deities.name: Saraswati
deities.visualSignature: white sari, veena, lotus, swan symbolism, calm radiant expression, luminous sacred wisdom
deities.auraStyle: warm ivory aura with soft wisdom glow, gentle light, and refined devotional clarity

deities.name: Ram
deities.visualSignature: bow and arrow, calm regal expression, blue skin, gold crown, righteous warrior presence
deities.auraStyle: golden righteous aura with subtle sunlit halo, dharmic strength, and noble calm

deities.name: Kali
deities.visualSignature: dark blue-black skin, tongue out, fierce face, dramatic eyes, skull garland, transformational intensity, protective ferocity
deities.auraStyle: deep crimson aura with red-black edge glow, fierce transformation, and negativity-destroying force

deities.name: Medicine Buddha
deities.visualSignature: deep blue skin, healing seated posture, nectar bowl, serene compassionate face, luminous restorative energy
deities.auraStyle: deep blue healing aura with gold highlights, restorative calm, and compassionate divine medicine energy
